title: telosma odoratissima
intro: Telosma odoratissima, also known as the Queen of the Night or Evening Primrose, is a flowering plant native to Southeast Asia, particularly in the tropical forests of Thailand and Malaysia. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of Telosma odoratissima include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
